# Staging deployment

## Manifest

- Commit/PR and immutable artifact digest:
- Environment and change window:
- DevOps reviewer / Release Manager reviewer:
- Human approver and approval record:

## Preconditions

- [ ] Required CI and security reviews pass
- [ ] Configuration diff contains no secrets
- [ ] Migration plan reviewed; separate staging-migration approval captured
- [ ] Health, smoke, monitoring, and rollback plans are ready

## Execution (approval required)

- Planned deployment steps:
- Planned migrations:
- Smoke/health checks:
- Observation window and success criteria:

## Rollback

- Last known-good artifact:
- Triggers, owner, steps, and post-rollback verification:
- Result/evidence:
